name: smart-agriculture
description: Smart Agriculture monorepo: Next web platform + Python soil moisture agent + Docker infrastructure.

scripts.dev:web: bash -lc 'source scripts/dev/load-root-env.sh && npm --prefix apps/web run dev'
scripts.dev:agent: bash -lc 'LOAD_ROOT_ENV_EXCLUDE_PATTERN="^AGENT_PORT$"; source scripts/dev/load-root-env.sh && PYTHONPATH=apps/agent .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --app-dir apps/agent --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${AGENT_PORT:-18010}'
scripts.start:web: bash -lc 'source scripts/dev/load-root-env.sh && npm --prefix apps/web run start'
scripts.start:agent: bash -lc 'LOAD_ROOT_ENV_EXCLUDE_PATTERN="^AGENT_PORT$"; source scripts/dev/load-root-env.sh && PYTHONPATH=apps/agent .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir apps/agent --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${AGENT_PORT:-18010}'
